_meta.purpose: Cross-session census heartbeat. Single source of truth for 'what is reviewed / what is left' across the ~4,439 IL GP practice census. READ on resume; UPDATE at end of every session.
_meta.no_anchor_rule: Consolidated/DSO percentages are computed FROM this census (the LEDGER), shown WITH coverage_pct. No external anchor (ADA 14.6%, metro 30%). The 5.58% detector floor is the starting point being corrected, NOT the answer. Partial-census reviewed rates and whole-universe confirmed floors must be labeled separately.

universe.scope: Chicagoland watched-ZIP general dental practice LOCATIONS
universe.ca_stray_note: location_id 951701941a7097e5, MIKE MIN W KANG DDS, state=CA in ZIP 60045; excluded by zip_scores state filter (correct).

ma_parked.status: PARKED — do not census, do not delete, filter from view

universe.denominator_source: SUM(zip_scores.total_gp_locations) WHERE state=IL; LEDGER keyed by practice_locations.location_id

census_status.note: 349 of 4439 IL GP locations have EARNED an ownership_tier through the hand-verified census (7.86%). The remaining 4090 stay undetermined until earned through evidence. Legacy detector 'corporate' counts are NOT assumed — re-confirmed via this protocol.

headline_metrics_live.rule: reviewed_rate: consolidated_pct = (T2+T3+T4+T5)/reviewed; dso_pe_pct = (T4+T5)/reviewed. whole_universe_floor: same numerators / 4439 with unreviewed held out as unknown. Always paired with coverage_pct + undetermined_pct. NULL until census has coverage.

legacy_detector_state.note: User ruling 2026-06-20: 5% is definitively false (too low). Starting floor only.

candidate_pools._note: Verified counts at NPI level unless stated; must dedup to LOCATIONS + GP-filter before any flip. Ortho brands EXCLUDED from GP.

D2_authorized_official_clusters._gate: mailing-address concentration: <=2 addrs across many ZIPs = high confidence; high addr count -> web verify, never auto-reject
